author: KulySocc
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open a folder in the file explorer to view its contents as a Bases-powered table of contents, with no companion note required.

manifest.author: KulySocc
manifest.description: Open a folder in the file explorer to view its contents as a Bases-powered table of contents, with no companion note required.
manifest.name: Folder Base View

name: Folder Base View

releases.author: KulySocc
releases.description:
Initial release of Folder Base View.

Click a folder in the file explorer to open a chosen `.base` as its table of contents, scoped to that folder — no companion note required.

Requirements: Obsidian 1.13+ (desktop) with the core Bases plugin enabled.
